name: Tyler Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line two 8-inch pie pans with pastry; flute edges, if desired.
3. Beat the eggs well, then add the sugar mixed with flour and salt. Mix well.
4. Add the butter, vanilla, and lemon extract. Stir until combined.
5. Stir in the milk. Divide the filling between the pastry-lined pans.
6. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until set and golden.
7. Makes two 8-inch pies; 6 slices each.
- PER SLICE: 440 calories, 5 g protein, 44 g carbohydrate, 25 g fat (13 g saturated), 117 mg cholesterol, 399 mg sodium, 0 g fiber.
From an article by Marion Cunningham, San Francisco Chronicle, 3/10/93.
